tests.name: schema.sql imports cleanly (12 tables, no errors)
admin/admins.php loads + renders Edit (super-edit-btn) + mask lock-icon + Reset buttons
Super-Edit action denies wrong verification answer (shows 'incorrect' flash)
Super-Edit action with correct answer ('kotdwar') updates password → verified via password_verify()
Super admin password changed and restored successfully; ensureSuperAdmin() does not force-reset on re-login
Exam save with all 14 proctor toggles → violation_config JSON persisted correctly
student/take-exam.php?exam_id=1 renders + fs-overlay visible + candidate card populated (name/roll/dob/exam_code)
api/violation.php POST logs row in violations table
api/save-answer.php POST persists JSON answer in attempt_answers

known_limitations_browser_level: F11 / Esc cannot be truly blocked on Firefox or Safari (no Keyboard Lock API) — 50ms auto re-enter is the fallback
Win+PrtSc saves screenshot directly to Pictures/Screenshots/ bypassing the clipboard wipe
Win+Shift+S (Snipping Tool) cannot be intercepted at the web layer
Third-party screenshot / screen-recording apps cannot be blocked from a browser
Phone camera photographing the monitor — not detectable
recommended_next_step: Scaffold an Electron desktop kiosk wrapper around the existing PHP portal to remove all browser-level limitations.
